data.title: Shore Surgery in New Zealand chooses Provation for endoscopy documentation, audit capabilities, and quality improvement.
data.description: A medical facility in Auckland, New Zealand called Shore Surgery has recently implemented Provation to enhance their endoscopy documentation processes. This move aims to improve audit capabilities and facilitate quality enhancement throughout their network.

data.title: XRP hits new all-time high after 7 years, surpassing record milestone amid altcoin momentum in crypto market.
data.description: The value of XRP surged to an all-time high, exceeding a level set seven years ago, amidst a strong uptrend for alternative cryptocurrencies in the digital asset market.

data.title: Netflix reported $11.08B Q2 revenue (up 16% YOY) and $7.19 EPS, with 34% operating margin, driven by more subscribers & ad revenue.
data.description: Netflix Inc (NASDAQ: NFLX) disclosed its second-quarter financial performance post-market on Thursday. The streaming giant posted revenue of $11.08 billion, marking a 16% uptick from the previous year, surpassing Street consensus of $11.04 billion (Benzinga Pro). Earnings per share were reported at $7.19, higher than the estimated $7.06. Operating margins stood at 34%, beating the company's own projection. The growth was supported by increased memberships, elevated pricing, and a surge in advertising revenue. Revenue growth by region: UCAN $4.93 billion (+15%), EMEA $3.54 billion (+18%), LATAM $1.31 billion (+9%), APAC $1.31 billion (+24%). Notably, UCAN's 15% yearly growth exceeded the previous year's 9%.

data.title: Granite REIT declares CDN $0.2833 per unit distribution for July 2025, payable on Aug 15 to unitholders of record on July 31.
data.description: In Toronto, Granite Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: GRT.UN / NYSE: GRP.U) revealed that its board declared a distribution of CDN $0.2833 per unit for July 2025. This payout is scheduled for August 15, 2025, and will be given to unitholders recorded at the end of trading on July 31, 2025. It is confirmed that this distribution does not include U.S. federal tax-related income.

data.title: Diodes Inc. to announce Q2 2025 results on August 7. Conference call at 4pm CT. Expected attendees: CEO, CFO, and SVP Sales.
data.description: Diodes Incorporated, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol DIOD, is set to conduct a conference call on Thursday, August 7th, at 4:00 p.m. Central Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) to review its financial performance for the second quarter of 2025. Present on the call will be Gary Yu, the President and CEO, along with Brett Whitmire, the Chief Financial Officer, and Emily Yang, the Senior VP of Worldwide Sales and Marketing. Further details regarding the results and other relevant information will be shared during the call.

data.title: The Estate of Robert Day at John Moran Auctioneers: Over 700 lots at landmark 2-day sale in LA on July 29-30, 2025.
data.description: The auction for The Estate of Robert Day is set to take place on July 29th and 30th, 2025, starting at 10:00am PDT in Los Angeles. John Moran Auctioneers will be overseeing the sale, which features over 700 unique lots from the collection of a prominent California figure. This two-day event is anticipated to draw significant interest from collectors and enthusiasts.

data.title: Market Veep to exhibit at FABTECH 2025 in Boston, the largest event for metal industry. Visit booth #A3289. #B2B #Marketing #GrowthStrategies
data.description: Head of Marketing at a prominent B2B agency will be presenting growth strategies at FABTECH 2025 in Boston on July 17, 2025. FABTECH is the biggest event in North America for metal forming, fabricating, welding, and finishing. It is a significant platform with high footfall, attracting numerous industry professionals, with expected attendance reaching thousands. Market Veep's involvement in this event signifies their commitment to sharing valuable insights and expertise in the field.

data.title: Toxic coal ash landfill cleanups delayed by 1 year by E.P.A. Utilities have extra time to clean up contaminated water.
data.description: Utilities across the United States have been granted an extension of one year by the Trump administration to develop strategies for the cleanup of polluted waterways. This decision provides more time for utilities to address environmental concerns and implement initiatives to improve water quality.

data.title: Stock market hits new high with Netflix earnings beating late, Taiwan Semi boosts, 5 stocks flash buy signals.
data.description: On Thursday, the stock market reached record highs, propelled by Taiwan Semiconductor's performance and positive economic indicators. Netflix reported earnings that surpassed expectations. Following this news, Dow Jones Futures showed promising signs with Netflix leading the way after the market's surge. Additionally, 5 stocks presented strong buy signals in light of the optimistic market conditions.

data.title: LegalZoom to announce Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 7, 2025 after the market close, for the quarter ended June 30, 2025. Nasdaq: LZ.
data.description: A popular online legal services provider, LegalZoom.com, Inc. (Nasdaq: LZ), headquartered in Mountain View, California, has disclosed plans to release its financial performance for the second quarter concluded on June 30, 2025. The announcement is scheduled to take place on Thursday, August 7, 2025, after the market closes.

data.title: Southwest Airlines to discuss Q2 2025 financial results on July 24, 2025, at 12:30 PM Eastern Time. CEO Bob Jordan will lead the webcast.
data.description: Join Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) for a live webcast of its Q2 2025 financial results on Thursday, July 24, 2025, at 12:30 PM Eastern Time. The webcast will feature Bob Jordan, the President and Chief Executive Officer. This announcement was made in Dallas on July 17, 2025.

data.title: Newcore Gold reports positive voting results at AGM on July 17, 2025. Shareholders approved all resolutions. TSX-V: NCAU, OTCQX: NCAUF.
data.description: VANCOUVER, BC, July 17, 2025 - Newcore Gold Ltd. announced favorable voting outcomes from its AGM on July 17, 2025. Shareholders supported all resolutions in the Notice of Meeting and Information Circular from June 13, 2025. Newcore Gold Ltd., listed as NCAU on TSX-V and NCAUF on OTCQX, expressed satisfaction with the results.
